data.title: FactSet Elevates AI Leadership with New C-Suite Roles
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Factset Research ( (FDS) ) has provided an update.

On March 4, 2026, FactSet Research Systems Inc. announced leadership changes effective March 2, 2026, with former Chief Technology Officer Kate Stepp appointed as Chief AI Officer and technology veteran Bob Stolte named Chief Technology Officer. Stepp will lead AI services and deployment across products and client solutions, while Stolte will oversee global technology, including platform modernization, engineering execution, cybersecurity, and operational resilience.

The appointments underscore FactSet’s strategy to accelerate enterprise AI adoption and strengthen its core technology platform in support of long-term growth. By elevating AI to a dedicated C-suite role and reinforcing technology leadership, the company is signaling a deeper commitment to AI-driven innovation, platform reliability, and differentiated capabilities for clients across the global financial ecosystem.

The most recent analyst rating on (FDS) stock is a Sell with a $210.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Factset Research stock, see the FDS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FDS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FDS is a Outperform.

The score reflects strong underlying financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook (solid subscription growth, high retention, reaffirmed guidance, and increased buyback authorization), supported by reasonable valuation. These positives are tempered by notably weak technicals, with the stock in a pronounced downtrend despite oversold signals.

To see Spark’s full report on FDS stock, click here.

More about Factset Research

FactSet Research Systems is a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider that integrates proprietary financial data, client datasets, and third-party sources into a single, cutting-edge platform. It serves more than 9,000 clients and over 239,000 users across the buy-side, sell-side, wealth management, private equity, and corporate sectors, with a focus on AI-enabled tools and multi-asset class coverage.

Average Trading Volume: 926,331

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.16B

data.title: Jardine Matheson Corrects Previously Reported Insider Share Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jardine Matheson Holdings ( (GB:JARB) ) has provided an announcement.

Jardine Matheson Holdings has issued a correction regarding a previously reported share transaction involving Ming Lu, a person discharging managerial responsibilities at the company. The firm clarified that Lu did not acquire 7,000 ordinary shares on 5 February 2026, contrary to what had been announced in an earlier regulatory notice.

The company has asked the market to disregard the earlier announcement, which had been lodged with the UK Financial Conduct Authority. This correction underscores Jardine Matheson’s efforts to maintain accurate disclosure of insider dealings, an important factor for regulatory compliance and investor confidence in governance standards.

More about Jardine Matheson Holdings

Jardine Matheson Holdings Limited is a diversified Asian-based conglomerate with interests spanning sectors such as property, retail, hospitality, engineering, and transport. The group typically focuses on long-term strategic holdings and management of leading businesses across key Asian markets, providing a broad exposure to regional economic growth and consumer demand.

data.title: Babcock & Wilcox Posts Strong 2025 Earnings, Cuts Debt
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Babcock & Wilcox Company ( (BW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 26, 2026, Babcock & Wilcox, through The Babcock & Wilcox Company, signed a $2.4 billion definitive design-build agreement with Base Electron, an Applied Digital company, to design and install four 300-megawatt natural gas-fired boilers and steam turbine systems to power an AI data center, converting an earlier limited notice to proceed into a full notice and lifting its backlog to $2.8 billion. On March 4, 2026, the company reported that fourth-quarter 2025 operating income rose to $12.2 million with adjusted EBITDA up 53% year over year, full-year 2025 adjusted EBITDA more than doubled to $43.7 million while losses from continuing operations narrowed sharply, and debt was significantly reduced, positioning B&W to capitalize on surging baseload power demand from data centers and increased coal utilization while it continues to strengthen its balance sheet.

The most recent analyst rating on (BW) stock is a Hold with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Babcock & Wilcox Company stock, see the BW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BW is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (losses, negative cash flows, and negative equity). This is partially offset by a strong earnings-call outlook (backlog growth, debt-reduction plans, and upbeat 2026 EBITDA guidance) and an uptrending price above major moving averages, though technical indicators are stretched. Valuation remains less supportive given the loss-driven negative P/E and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on BW stock, click here.

More about Babcock & Wilcox Company

Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises, Inc. is an energy and industrial technology company focused on providing steam generation equipment, natural gas-fired boilers, coal power technologies, and related parts and services. It targets baseload power generation markets globally, with growing exposure to North American utilities and the rapidly expanding artificial intelligence data center sector, supported by a global project pipeline exceeding $12 billion.

Average Trading Volume: 2,882,533

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $999.9M

See more data about BW stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SynAct Pharma Sets Capital Markets Day as It Enters Key Clinical Inflection Point
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SynAct Pharma AB ( (SE:SYNACT) ) has provided an update.

SynAct Pharma is convening investors, analysts and media for a Capital Markets Day in Stockholm on March 11, positioning its resolution therapy platform at the center of upcoming clinical and strategic milestones. The event underscores the company’s shift into a transformational phase, with Phase 2b data in newly diagnosed severe rheumatoid arthritis expected in the second quarter and an expanding pipeline in viral-induced inflammation.

During the Capital Markets Day, management and external clinical experts will detail the mechanisms and market potential of SynAct’s lead candidate resomelagon, as well as its respiratory infection program, including the RESPIRE trial. The agenda also features sessions on market overviews and potential deal scenarios, signaling a focus on partnering and business development that could materially influence SynAct’s future funding, commercialization path and industry positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:SYNACT) stock is a Hold with a SEK22.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SynAct Pharma AB stock, see the SE:SYNACT Stock Forecast page.

More about SynAct Pharma AB

SynAct Pharma AB is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on resolving inflammation by selectively activating the melanocortin system. Its portfolio of oral and injectable melanocortin agonists targets anti-inflammatory and inflammation resolution mechanisms, aiming to restore immune balance for patients with severe inflammatory conditions such as rheumatoid arthritis and viral-induced inflammation.

Average Trading Volume: 138,007

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: SEK1.01B

data.title: Grupo Televisa Reports 2025 Results and Consolidates Cable and Sky Into Single Telecom Segment
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Grupo Televisa, S.A.B. ( (TV) ) is now available.

On February 26, 2026, Grupo Televisa reported its full-year and fourth-quarter 2025 results, highlighting a 5.4% year-on-year revenue decline to Ps.58.88 billion, mainly from weaker satellite services, and a slight 0.6% drop in operating segment income, although margins improved to 39.1%. The company also completed the operational integration of its Cable and Sky units into a single Telecom segment, while its net loss attributable to stockholders widened to Ps.8.82 billion due largely to non-cash tax-related write-offs and higher losses from associates, partly offset by stronger operating income and lower other and finance expenses.

Televisa’s change in segment reporting reflects a strategic consolidation of its telecom operations, with a unified management team and a consolidated cost structure aimed at capturing efficiencies and synergies across residential, satellite and enterprise services. Despite the larger bottom-line loss driven by tax effects and equity-accounted investments, the improved operating performance and cost efficiencies indicate a business that is strengthening its core operations even as it navigates structural challenges in its satellite business and the legacy impact of expiring tax assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TV) stock is a Hold with a $3.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Grupo Televisa, S.A.B. stock, see the TV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TV is a Neutral.

Grupo Televisa’s overall stock score is driven by significant financial challenges and valuation concerns, partially offset by moderate technical strength and positive developments in operational efficiency and cash flow generation. The earnings call provided some optimism, but the company must address revenue declines and subscriber losses to improve its financial health.

To see Spark’s full report on TV stock, click here.

More about Grupo Televisa, S.A.B.

Grupo Televisa, S.A.B. is a major Mexican telecommunications company that operates one of the country’s largest cable networks and a leading direct-to-home satellite pay television system. Its cable networks provide bundled high-speed data, video, mobile and voice services to residential and commercial users, along with managed telecom services to domestic and international enterprise customers.

Average Trading Volume: 1,532,528

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $1.34B

For a thorough assessment of TV stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zixin Group Raises S$2.38 Million From Exercise of Share Options
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zixin Group ( (SG:42W) ) has shared an update.

Zixin Group Holdings has increased its issued share capital following the exercise of company options by three investors under a previously announced share option agreement. The investors subscribed for a total of 79,333,333 new shares at an exercise price of S$0.030 per share, raising S$2.38 million in cash consideration for the company.

Following this allotment, Zixin Group’s total shares outstanding rose from 1,931,133,242 to 2,010,466,575, and its issued and paid-up capital increased from S$220.3 million to S$222.7 million. The newly issued shares will rank pari passu with existing shares, except for certain prior entitlements, and are expected to be listed and quoted on the Catalist Board from 5 March 2026, modestly diluting existing shareholders while strengthening the company’s equity base.

More about Zixin Group

Zixin Group Holdings Limited is a Singapore-listed company operating through various subsidiaries under a group structure. Its shares are quoted on the Catalist Board, positioning the firm within the small to mid-cap segment of the local equity market and providing access to capital through equity issuances and share option schemes.

Average Trading Volume: 6,824,222

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Lai Fung Keeps Operations Steady as It Works to Restore Public Float Compliance
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Lai Fung Holdings ( (HK:1125) ) just unveiled an update.

Lai Fung Holdings said its operations have remained normal since the resumption of trading in its shares in November 2022, but its public float currently stands at about 14.76%, below the 25% level required under Hong Kong listing rules. The company plans to continue talks with controlling shareholders, core connected persons and financial advisers to restore compliance, and will issue monthly updates on its public float status and adhere to other applicable listing requirements, while cautioning investors to exercise care when dealing in its shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1125) stock is a Sell with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lai Fung Holdings stock, see the HK:1125 Stock Forecast page.

The group focuses on maintaining normal operations while its shares trade on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, with a shareholder base that includes controlling shareholders and a mix of executive and independent non-executive directors.

data.title: Elliptic Labs Makes Interim CEO and CFO Appointments Permanent to Support Growth Push
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Elliptic Laboratories AS ( (DE:EIP) ) has shared an announcement.

Elliptic Laboratories AS has confirmed interim leaders Ola Sandstad and Mathias Norderud as permanent CEO and CFO, respectively, solidifying its executive team after a transition period that began in 2025. Sandstad, who joined the company in 2021 and has held senior roles in product development and investor relations, has guided Elliptic Labs’ strategic direction as interim CEO since November 2025, while Norderud, with the firm since 2021, has strengthened financial reporting and operational discipline as interim CFO.

The board said the move ensures continuity, stability, and operational focus as the Edge AI specialist scales its software-defined sensing platform globally and pursues its strategic growth ambitions. By formalizing the leadership of two executives already embedded in the company’s operations, Elliptic Labs aims to maintain momentum in expanding its AI Virtual Smart Sensor Platform across devices and markets, which could support investor confidence and reinforce its competitive position in the fast-evolving AI-enabled device ecosystem.

More about Elliptic Laboratories AS

Elliptic Laboratories AS is a global Edge AI company that delivers low-power, on-device sensing technology through its AI Virtual Smart Sensor Platform, enabling intelligent, always-on contextual awareness without extra hardware or constant cloud connectivity. Its software-defined sensing solutions, deployed in more than 500 million devices worldwide, serve a wide range of consumer and enterprise products, enhancing security, personalization, productivity, and user experience.

Headquartered in Norway and listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange, Elliptic Labs operates across the USA, China, South Korea, Taiwan, and Japan, with all technology and intellectual property developed and owned in Norway, supporting its independence and long-term innovation strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 411,190

Current Market Cap: NOK386.4M

For a thorough assessment of EIP stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BH Macro Publishes New Transparency Report on Master Fund NAV
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

BH Macro Shs GBP ( (GB:BHMG) ) has shared an update.

BH Macro Limited, the Guernsey-based closed-ended investment company providing listed access to Brevan Howard’s global macro hedge fund strategies, continues to serve as a vehicle for investors seeking exposure to the Brevan Howard Master Fund. The company’s structure allows shareholders to participate indirectly in the performance and risk profile of the underlying master fund portfolio.

The company announced that it has received an Investor Transparency Report from State Street Fund Services (Ireland) Limited, the administrator of the Brevan Howard Master Fund, detailing the master fund’s net asset value as at 31 December 2025. This transparency report has been made available on BH Macro’s website, enhancing information access for shareholders and supporting ongoing disclosure around the fund’s underlying NAV.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:BHMG) stock is a Buy with a £444.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BH Macro Shs GBP stock, see the GB:BHMG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:BHMG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:BHMG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by a very strong balance sheet (no debt) but held back by inconsistent earnings/cash flow history. Weak technical momentum and a high P/E further constrain the rating, while ongoing buybacks provide only a modest offset.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:BHMG stock, click here.

More about BH Macro Shs GBP

BH Macro Limited is a closed-ended investment company incorporated in Guernsey that invests substantially all of its assets in the Brevan Howard Master Fund Limited. The vehicle offers listed investors access to Brevan Howard’s macro trading strategies, providing exposure to a diversified global macro hedge fund through a permanent capital structure.
